heading: Organization
label: 90101 Organization
notes: Amendments2014— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 113–237section 152601 of this title
amendments: Amendments2014— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 113–237section 152601 of this title

children.heading: .—Federal Charter
children.label: a .—Federal Charter
children.text: The Help America Vote Foundation (in this chapter, the “foundation”) is a federally chartered corporation.

children.heading: .—Nature of Foundation
children.label: b .—Nature of Foundation
children.text: The foundation is a charitable and nonprofit corporation and is not an agency or establishment of the United States Government.

children.heading: .—Perpetual Existence
children.label: c .—Perpetual Existence
children.text: Except as otherwise provided, the foundation has perpetual existence.
